body:
## Summary
- remove the `色々まとめ速報` rule from `resources/fullfeed/items_all.json`
- record `^http://iroirosokuhou\.com/archives/\d+\.html$` in `.github/port.md` under ignored URLs
- store the latest processed rule in cache-memory as `port-progress.json`

## Why
The site redirects to HTTPS and responds with a Cloudflare 403 challenge from the top page, so it is not currently reachable for rule migration.

## Validation
- `composer run test`
- `composer run lint`
title: chore: ignore iroirosokuhou rule
